title: Trump's field game in Arizona still minimal as Election Day nears
shortDescription: One former Trump campaign official wonders how much it will matter.

title: RFK Jr. will be a bigger spoiler for Biden in debates, experts warn
shortDescription: Experts warn that Biden may be at more of a disadvantage than Trump if independent candidate Robert F. Kennedy Jr. qualifies to be on the debate stage.

title: Trump trial schedule: Barron Trump's graduation means brief pause
shortDescription: Donald Trump's criminal hush money trial is off Friday so the former president can attend his son Barron's high school graduation in Florida.

title: President Joe Biden's speech has to go off without a hitch, Morehouse College says
shortDescription: David A. Thomas, Morehouse College president will cancel all commencement ceremonies "on the spot" if President Joe Biden's speech is interrupted.

title: If convicted in the hush money trial, can Trump still be elected?
shortDescription: Multiple law experts weigh in their thoughts on if Trump can legally become president if he is convicted of crimes.

title: Trump allies show up at trial, call it a 'sham'
shortDescription: About a dozen House Republicans assembled outside the New York City courthouse to blast aspects of former President Donald Trump’s hush money trial.

title: House votes to force Biden to send bombs to Israel, testing Democrats
shortDescription: The bill would coerce Biden to continue sending arms to Israel or else lose funding for the Pentagon and Department of State.

title: OnPolitics: Haley is still getting primary votes. Is Trump in trouble?
shortDescription: Nikki Haley is still going strong in the Republican primaries as she racks up a notable share of votes against Donald Trump, spelling a warning sign for him.

title: Democrats want answers from Justice Thomas about $267,000 loan for RV
shortDescription: Two Democratic senators say Justice Clarence Thomas needs to show whether he owed, and paid, taxes on any loan forgiveness.

title: Biden invokes executive privilege on recordings
shortDescription: President Joe Biden is invoking executive privilege to stop the release of his deposition tapes with the special counsel.

title: Matt Gaetz echoes Donald Trump's infamous Proud Boys shoutout on X
shortDescription: Rep. Matt Gaetz joined Republicans supporting Donald Trump at his Manhattan criminal trial, and he echoed Trump's 2020 line about the Proud Boys

title: Trump makes time for campaign events amidst trial. Which are next?
shortDescription: Despite doubts about Republican presidential frontrunner Donald Trump having time to campaign amidst trials, he continues to travel the country.

title: President Biden hails 'major step' toward declassifying marijuana
shortDescription: President Biden endorsed reclassifying marijuana as a less dangerous drug as he hailed his administration taking a "major step" toward the move.

title: NC Senate passes bill banning masks in public. What you need to know.
shortDescription: North Carolina community members, activists expressed deep concern for mask banning bill. Here’s what you need to know.

title: Donald and Melania Trump's sole son graduates high school on Friday.
shortDescription: Here are a few need-to-knows about Donald Trump's youngest son graduating from Oxbridge Academy on Friday.

title: Trump says there's a 'pretty good chance' he will announce VP at RNC
shortDescription: Trump also weighed in on Robert F. Kennedy Jr., saying he would still participate in presidential debates if Kennedy qualifies to be on stage.

title: Trump video covers elections and COVID-19, not bird flu | Fact check
shortDescription: The video is miscaptioned. Trump doesn't mention bird flu in the video. It's also not new or "breaking," as the post claims. It's from 2023.

title: When is the first Joe Biden-Donald Trump debate? Date, time, how to watch
shortDescription: President Joe Biden and Donald Trump have agreed to debate each other twice. Here's what to know about the first debate.

title: 2024 Biden-Trump debate moderators for CNN and ABC are announced
shortDescription: CNN and ABC announce the moderators for the upcoming Biden-Trump debates in June and September.
